posts.author: AMassey (Alesia Massey)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am not sure if this has been suggested previously or not. I cannot find a tag for “Lists,” so cannot search for this topic, which amazes me.

Is there no one else who would like to be able to apply attributes (both custom and not) to an entire LIST, not just items in a list? This simple feature would make Monday.com SO MUCH MORE FLEXIBLE in terms of how and what it can be used for.

PLEASE PLEASE PLEASE allow users to apply attributes (including customizable attributes) to LISTS!!
